name: smartchain-desktop
description: SmartAccounting Electron desktop shell — wraps the web frontend with native printer, scanner, offline-queue and updater capabilities.

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd ../frontend && npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.build:frontend: cd ../frontend && cross-env VITE_DESKTOP_BUNDLE=true npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && tsc && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.build:win: npm run build:frontend && tsc && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:frontend && tsc && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:frontend && tsc && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.cjs
